name: Pipeline Aging Report
description: Surface stalled opportunities (open deals with no recent activity), sorted by value and prioritized for action. Removes the dead weight inflating coverage and skewing forecasts.
alsoSurfaces: Which open deals have gone silent and need reviving or closing out?
How much of our open pipeline is technically dead?
Where is stalling concentrated: by stage, by owner, by segment?
Which stalled deals have positive recent signals worth re-engaging on?
beforeWeRun: Stalled threshold: 14, 21, or 30 days since last activity?
Which stages to include: all open stages, or exclude Prospecting?
Activity types that count: calls, emails, meetings, sequence steps, all?

whatYoullGet.name: Headline metrics
whatYoullGet.desc: Stalled count, stalled value, % of open pipeline, WoW delta.

whatYoullGet.name: Aging buckets
whatYoullGet.desc: Distribution of stalled deals across configurable buckets (e.g., 21–30d, 31–60d, 60–90d, 90+d).

whatYoullGet.name: Stalled deals table
whatYoullGet.desc: Sortable table with action recommendations: revive, downgrade, close-lost.

whatYoullGet.name: Stall rate by stage
whatYoullGet.desc: Per-stage stall percentage with health-band coloring.

whatYoullGet.name: Stall rate by owner
whatYoullGet.desc: Per-owner stall percentage to spot patterns by rep.

whatYoullGet.name: Reactivation candidates
whatYoullGet.desc: Card list of stalled deals showing recent positive signals worth a follow-up.

callout: 4 quick inputs, then Sage builds your aging report in ~11 min.
